title: DDE
text: DDE Controls whether DDE support is available within a Uniface application. DDE = on | off Default value off File section [udde] Related Links DDE Support Dynamic Data Exchange (DDE) is an old communication technology that allows DDE-enabled applications running under Microsoft Windows to dynamically exchange data with another via a defined link between them. The communication between such applications is referred to as a conversation. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
